title: Clidemia octona
taxonomy: Clidemia octona is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a member of the genus Clidemia, which is native to Central and South America. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the membrane flowers or the tropical honeysuckle family. Members of this family are often found in tropical and subtropical regions, and they are known for their brightly colored flowers and unique seed pods. Clidemia octona is often found in moist, tropical forests and is valued for its potential medicinal and ornamental uses.
